title: IssueEvent
description: Immutable, append-only record of a single item issued to a student. One issue_event per item, even when many items share one batch signature. White paper §9.1, §15.

id.description: UUIDv7. Identity is minted at creation (offline or online) and never changes.

revision.description: Idempotency key. A replayed {id, revision} is a no-op server-side.

student_id.description: Internal student UUID (the Master PEA ID lives on the student record).

catalogue_item_id.description: References the imported rubric catalogue entry that drives the cost.

cost.description: Cost in CFA minor units (integer, no decimals).

issued_at.description: Device local time of issuance (RFC 3339 UTC).

synced_time.description: Cloud-restamped authoritative time at sync; null until synced.

staff_id.description: Bursar/admin who issued the item; attributable for audit.

signature_ref.description: Reference to the captured signature image. May be shared by all issue_events in the same batch_id.

batch_id.description: Groups all items issued under a single student signature.

status.description: Lifecycle by NEW events only; never edit. A return is a new 'return' event; a void carries a reason.
